caption: A person wearing a dark gray ribbed long-sleeved shirt and a rose gold watch with a light-colored band is seen working with holiday cards on a light-colored wooden surface. In the initial frames, only the person's arm is visible as they move across the scene. As the sequence progresses, the person uses their hands to hold and adjust a greeting card. The card features a light blue background and a gold-colored section. A cream-colored rectangular label is attached to the card, featuring the text "SENDING YOU A LITTLE Yuletide Cheer". Other cards with similar blue colors and floral illustrations are visible on the table. The person's hands carefully position the label and hold the card steady, showcasing the final look of the holiday stationery against the white wood grain background.
